sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n60856" key="kunhti/ndă" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κῠνητίνδᾰ</orth> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">παιδιά</foreign>), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n60856.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">game of kissing</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0433.tlg001:23" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Crates Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">23</biblScope> </bibl> (lyr.).</sense> </entryFree>
